I need to report this Steam account because this user purchased my item illegally. I listed an item on the Steam Marketplace and this person bought it but didn't receive anything. hello. Thank you for contacting our support team.
WARNING: Avoid this user - scam
Steam ID Profile: Dimbluish_PaddyNeko 765611984132145736

Latest Report: Illegal Purchases

This Steam account will do the job. If you dispute this and do not provide valid evidence, you run a very high risk of losing your account and access to the game. Please contact Bushyasta , Steam developer and support representative responsible for this report. If you need assistance, please contact Steam Support .

This is because it violates Steam service protocol rules. This account is pending suspension for 24 hours before being permanently suspended.

And that is a breach of contract. The account also violated federal and state laws. If such activity continues, Valve reserves the right to refer the matter to legal authorities. Thank you for your inquiry!

Please see the Steam Subscriber Agreement and Steam Service Protocol for more information . and Steam Service Protocol. Please refer.

If valid evidence is not provided, the reported account will be permanently suspended within 24 hours of ticket submission. Please contact our support team for more information.

If you wish to dispute this, please contact the moderator responsible for this report.
